CREATE TABLE customer.stg_closedclaims_claims_t (
	[token] nvarchar(200) NOT NULL,

	[claimlinenumber] nvarchar(10) NULL,

	[billingprovidernpi] nvarchar(10) NULL,
	[billingproviderlastname] nvarchar(50) NULL,
	[billingproviderfirstname] nvarchar(50) NULL,
	[billingprovidermiddlename] nvarchar(50) NULL,
	[billingprovidercompanyname] nvarchar(200) NULL,
	[billingprovidertaxonomycode] nvarchar(20) NULL,
	[billingtaxonomyclassification] nvarchar(50) NULL,
	[renderingprovidernpi] nvarchar(10) NULL,

	[renderingproviderfirstname] nvarchar(50) NULL,

	[icdcmdxcode05] nvarchar(10) NULL,
	[icdcmdxcode06] nvarchar(10) NULL,
	[icdcmdxcode07] nvarchar(10) NULL,
	[icdcmdxcode08] nvarchar(10) NULL,
	[icdcmdxcode09] nvarchar(10) NULL,

	[icdcmpxcode04] nvarchar(10) NULL,
	[icdcmpxcode05] nvarchar(10) NULL,

	[icdcmpxcode21] nvarchar(10) NULL,
	[icdcmpxcode22] nvarchar(10) NULL,
	[icdcmpxcode23] nvarchar(10) NULL,
	[icdcmpxcode24] nvarchar(10) NULL,
	[icdcmpxcode25] nvarchar(10) NULL

WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX

GO
